metadata.description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace hosting spec-autopilot, parallel-harness, and daily-report plugins

plugins.name: spec-autopilot
plugins.description: Spec-driven autopilot orchestration for delivery pipelines with 8-phase workflow, 3-layer gate system, and crash recovery

plugins.name: parallel-harness
plugins.description: Parallel AI engineering control-plane plugin with task-graph scheduling, file ownership isolation, cost-aware model routing, 9-gate system, RBAC governance, and audit trail

plugins.name: daily-report
plugins.description: Auto-generate and submit daily work reports from git commits and Lark chat history
